title: Quebec City Heavy Rain
lead: A critical heavy rain event is affecting Quebec City, with a Z-Score of -3.54. This anomaly is expected to cause significant disruptions.
body:
The heavy rain is causing significant flooding in the area, with a high humidity level of 91% and moderate winds of 9.7 km/h.
 The HDD value of 13.4 GG indicates a high demand for heating, while the CDD value of 0.0 GG suggests no cooling demand.
 The Umidita value of 91% and Vento value of 9.7 km/h will exacerbate the flooding and disruptions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain.
